prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-11PCGOLDKIT2020-AMZ-HPN Product Type: MESS_KIT Brand (from catalog): Morocca Existing Title: 11 pc Prospecting-Mining-Panning Kit- 2- Classifiers 3 Gold Pans,+ MORE!! Description: This Great 11 pc Mining Kit includes

. 1Pc Sifting Pan (Mesh Size: 1/2", Wire Thickness: 1.4mm) Fits on a 5 Gallon Bucket

. 1Pc Sifting Pan (Mesh Size: 1/8", Wire Thickness: 0.6mm) Fits on a 5 Gallon Bucket

. 1Pc 8" Green Gold Pan, Dual Riffles

. 1Pc 10" Green Gold Pan, Dual Riffles
. 1Pc 14" Green Gold Pan ,Dual Riffles

. 1Pc Tweezer With Magnifier w/Glass Lens, Stainless Steel

. 1Pc 5" Plastic Snifter Bottle

. 1Pc Magnetic Separator Pick Up with Quick Release

. 1Pc 12" Heavy Duty Plastic Body Prospector's Sand Scoop- Green Color

. 2 Pc Glass Vials Search Terms: (none) Features: - Big 11 pc Mining Kit - Ready to help you get the GOLD!!! - 2 Large Screens 1/2" & 1/8" Stackable on a 5 Gallon Bucket - Large 14", 10" & 8" Green Gold Pans - Gold Vial, Tweezers, Snuffer Bottle, Loupe & 12" Scoop === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2 Classifiers, 3 Gold Pans 8-14In, Tweezers, Magnetic Separator, Sand Scoop, Vials

openai.title_differentiation: 2 Stackable Classifiers For 5 Gallon Bucket, 3 Green Gold Pans 8-14 Inch, Vials, Tweezers, Snuffer Bottle, Magnetic Picker
